title: asset delivery health (Next.js chunks)
description: P0 gate: validate that Next.js static chunks under /_next/static/chunks/* are served (200) so client-side hydration works. If this fails, all UI/E2E tests are invalid.

title: public routes health (no 5xx)
description: P0 gate: validate critical public routes (/, /login, /signup, /register) do not return 5xx. Signup/register 5xx blocks onboarding/deploy.

title: health API structured response
description: Validate GET /api/health returns JSON payload with status/checks/timestamp/responseTime and proper HTTP status (200 healthy or 503 degraded).

title: pptx upload validation and storage
description: Test the /api/pptx/upload endpoint: reject missing/empty file (400) and accept a valid PPTX-like file (200) when storage is configured (Supabase or local). Uses x-user-id bypass where available.

title: render start negative validations
description: Validate POST /api/render/start rejects missing projectId (400), rejects empty slides (400) and returns 404 when project does not exist (using x-user-id header).

title: custom 404 page
description: Validate unknown routes return 404 and render the custom not-found page content.

title: legacy: pptx upload file validation and storage (old plan id)
description: Legacy placeholder. Prefer TS001/TS000/TS002 suite for actionable regression.
